data.title: Metropolitan Water District is starting project to boost water supply for LA and Ventura counties hit by drought.
data.description: Los Angeles, Metropolitan Water District of Southern California will commence the Sepulveda Feeder Pump Stations project to enhance water reliability in areas of Los Angeles and Ventura counties. These regions faced significant water reduction mandates due to the unprecedented drought in 2020-2022. The project involves pushing Colorado River water and stored resources from Diamond Valley Lake, the largest reservoir in Southern California. This initiative aims to bolster water supplies for communities impacted by the recent drought.

data.title: Celebration of 100 years of Illinois Route 66 in McLean County by VisitBN with yearlong centennial-themed events.
data.description: In Bloomington-Normal, Illinois, on January 20, 2026, VisitBN (Bloomington-Normal Area Convention and Visitors Bureau) revealed plans for a year-long tribute to the 100th anniversary of Historic Route 66 in McLean County. Throughout the year, festivities will take place along the iconic route from Chenoa to McLean, featuring special events to commemorate the Mother Road's milestone celebrations.

data.title: Land O'Lakes, Inc. and Imagine Entertainment collaborate to redefine rural America narratives for film and TV creators.
data.description: Collaborating to provide valuable insights and support for film and TV creators, Land O'Lakes, Inc. has teamed up to assist in portraying rural America authentically. The partnership, announced in Arden Hills, Minnesota, and Los Angeles, aims to offer resources for creators looking to depict rural settings accurately. The initiative was launched before the 2026 Sundance Film Festival, emphasizing the importance of authenticity in storytelling. This collaboration signifies a commitment to ensuring accurate representation in media, highlighting the significance of showcasing rural America in a truthful light.

data.title: Three national security professionals have joined Greenberg Traurig amid rising global risks, assisting clients in managing security threats.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, worldwide companies are encountering a period characterized by political turmoil, increasing regional disputes, and growing cyber risks. The necessity of safeguarding their resources and personnel has reached unprecedented levels. Consequently, organizations are seeking guidance to comprehend and address these challenges.

data.title: AIF Fund V invests $150,000-200,000 in Clearcut Surgical, Frönen Foods, and TaxRay, adding to its portfolio.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Fairfield, Connecticut, the Angel Investor Forum (AIF) revealed that AIF Seed Fund V LLC (Fund V) has successfully invested between $150,000 and $200,000 in three startups. The chosen portfolio companies are Clearcut Surgical, Frönen Foods, and TaxRay. Clearcut Surgical, specifically, is one of the recipients and has received funding for its innovative project.

data.title: Co-Founder of Sega, David Rosen, passed away at 95. He turned a photo booth business into a major gaming industry player, creating hits like Mortal Kombat and Sonic the Hedgehog.
data.description: A remarkable entrepreneur transitioned his Japanese photo booth venture into a prominent player in the gaming industry, responsible for developing popular titles such as Mortal Kombat and Sonic the Hedgehog. Through his innovative vision, he expanded his business empire with an impressive array of games that garnered millions of players worldwide. His journey showcases the transformative power of seizing opportunities and diversifying into new markets, leading to a substantial increase in revenue and global influence.

data.title: Sylmar Group acquires Atlantic Water Management, leading provider of water treatment solutions.
data.description: Sylmar Group, a prominent company specializing in industrial water treatment solutions, has recently acquired Atlantic Water Management. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for Sylmar Group, showcasing its dedication to expanding its portfolio and strengthening its position in the market. The acquisition of Atlantic Water Management is expected to bring valuable assets and expertise to Sylmar Group, further enhancing its ability to provide top-notch water treatment solutions to its clients. It demonstrates Sylmar Group's commitment to growth and innovation in the industry.

data.title: CIOs to gain clarity on tech priorities at Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in New Orleans on Feb 3-4 amidst rapid tech changes.
data.description: With the acceleration of technological advancements, the pressure on CIOs to make timely decisions has intensified. Distinguishing significant innovation from irrelevant noise has emerged as a vital test of leadership. Those attending Info-Tech LIVE 2026 in New Orleans on February 3 – 4, 2026, can participate in the Tech Trends 2026 session. This session aims to help IT leaders navigate the fast-evolving tech landscape.

data.title: BuildersUpdate.com suggests "Portable Mortgage" idea to boost housing market & new-home sales, aiding millions of homeowners.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on January 20, 2026, BuildersUpdate.com is promoting a new initiative to stimulate the housing market. The concept aims to boost new-home sales and provide opportunities for millions of homeowners impacted by record-low mortgage rates. This initiative seeks to drive discussions on reviving the housing sector and promoting mobility among homeowners.

data.title: Bitcoin falls below $90,000, Ethereum under $3,000, causing half a million liquidations in crypto market. Traders lost $693.07 million; Monero, Dash, Hyperliquid among top losers.
data.description: Bitcoin dropped below $90,000 on Tuesday due to new tariff threats impacting risk assets, resulting in over 500,000 liquidations in the crypto market. The current prices for cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $89,648.91, Ethereum at $2,997.69, Solana at $127.30, XRP at $1.90, Dogecoin at $0.1240, and Shiba Inu at $0.05771. According to Coinglass data, 163,275 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $693.07 million. The top losers in the last 24 hours were Monero, Dash, and Hyperliquid. Additionally, recent developments include the banning of Polymarket by two countries within 48 hours. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cintas Corp (Nasdaq: CTAS) announces $0.45 quarterly cash dividend, payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: Cintas Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as CTAS, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per share of common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. The Board of Directors at Cintas has been consistently increasing dividends annually since the company went public in 1983, marking 42 years of sustained growth. This move highlights the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders. Any forthcoming dividend decisions will be subject to Board approval.

data.title: Home Helpers® Home Care recognized as a top franchise in Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® ranking for the fifth year.
data.description: Home Helpers® Home Care, a top franchise in the in-home care sector, has shown remarkable growth in the senior care industry. This marks their fifth consecutive year being recognized on a prestigious national list. The company, headquartered in Cincinnati, has become a key player in providing nonmedical in-home companionship and personal care services. The steady expansion of Home Helpers® Home Care showcases the increasing demand for their services, with impressive numbers indicating their success in the market.

data.title: Culture Partners' "Surrender to Lead" garners 14,000+ presales, shows demand for results-driven leadership.
data.description: A recently published book titled "Surrender to Lead" by authors Joe Terry and Dr. Jessica Kriegel is gaining significant attention for its focus on results-driven leadership. This book is released by Culture Partners, a prominent company in the field of culture transformation. The launch took place in Temecula, California, on January 20, 2026. The book reflects the increasing demand for effective leadership strategies, with a particular emphasis on achieving tangible outcomes. Culture Partners' initiative in publishing this book underscores their commitment to addressing this need in the global market.
